title: boAt Earbuds Review - 999 Mein Itna Kuch?!

scenes.speaker: arjun
scenes.text: Dosto! Aaj main review karunga boAt Airdopes 311 Pro! Keemat? Sirf 999 rupaye! Haan, tumne sahi suna. 999 rupaye!

scenes.speaker: neha
scenes.text: 999 mein kya milega Arjun? Sirf plastic ka dabba milega! Acche earbuds ke liye kam se kam 5000 lagane padte hain.

scenes.speaker: arjun
scenes.text: Neha ji, aapka soch purana ho gaya! Yeh dekho, 10mm drivers hain! Bass itna solid hai ki chest thump hota hai! Maine Arijit Singh ka Kesariya suna, mujhe laga main concert mein hoon!

scenes.speaker: neha
scenes.text: Accha? Aur battery? Meri friend ke earbuds ek ghante mein mar jaate hain.

scenes.speaker: arjun
scenes.text: Baat mat karo! 28 ghante ki total playback! Case ke saath! Matlab subah office jaao, shaam ko ghar aao, ek baar bhi charge nahi karna padega! Poora din music, poora din vibe!

scenes.speaker: rahul
scenes.text: Bhai calls kaisa sound karta hai? Main bahut calls leta hoon, mujhe clear mic chahiye.

scenes.speaker: arjun
scenes.text: Rahul bhai, ENx noise cancellation hai calls ke liye! Maine auto rickshaw mein baith ke call kiya, saamne wale ko laga main office mein hoon! Rickshaw wale uncle bhi impress ho gaye!

scenes.speaker: neha
scenes.text: Haha! Woh toh funny hai! Aur waterproof hai ya nahi? Kal baarish mein mera headphone kharab ho gaya tha!

scenes.speaker: arjun
scenes.text: IPX5 rating hai! Baarish ho, gym mein pasina ho, kitchen mein paani udhe, koi tension nahi! Yeh earbuds tumse zyada strong hain!

scenes.speaker: rahul
scenes.text: Yaar 999 mein yeh sab? Mera 3000 wala earbuds toh isse kam features deta hai! Abhi order karta hoon!

scenes.speaker: neha
scenes.text: Arjun, mujhe bhi ek dilwa do. But kisiko batana mat ki maine maangi. Reputation ka sawaal hai.

scenes.speaker: arjun
scenes.text: Haha! Dekha dosto? Sab convert ho gaye! boAt Airdopes 311 Pro, 999 rupaye mein best earbuds! Link description mein hai! Jaldi grab karo before stock khatam! Like, share, subscribe!
